citations_and_sources_with_field_reasoni: Citations and sources with field, reasoning, citations, confidence (for deep research)
enter_search_queries_separated_by_commas: Enter search queries separated by commas (e.g., "Founding year UN", "Year of founding United Nations")
enter_urls_separated_by_commas_e_g_https: Enter URLs separated by commas (e.g., https://example.com, https://another.com)
enter_your_parallel_ai_api_key: Enter your Parallel AI API key
enter_your_research_question_up_to_15_00: Enter your research question (up to 15,000 characters)
integrate_parallel_ai_into_the_workflow_: Integrate Parallel AI into the workflow. Can search the web, extract information from URLs, and conduct deep research.
research_content_for_deep_research_struc: Research content (for deep research, structured based on output_schema)
run_parallel_ai_deep_research_on_a_compa: Run Parallel AI deep research on a company and produce a cited brief covering funding, leadership, and product.
search_or_extract_results_array_of_url_t: Search or extract results (array of url, title, excerpts)
search_parallel_ai_for_recent_announceme: Search Parallel AI for recent announcements from named competitors and summarize the changes.
use_parallel_ai_extract_to_pull_structur: Use Parallel AI extract to pull structured facts from a list of source URLs.
use_parallel_ai_search_to_answer_a_quest: Use Parallel AI search to answer a question across the web and return ranked, cited results.
what_information_to_extract_from_the_url: What information to extract from the URLs?
when_was_the_united_nations_established_: When was the United Nations established? Prefer UN's websites.
